VCF Design Decision Library

VMware Cloud Foundation 9.0 — Interactive Explorer

👤 Author: L.COSCIA 🏢 ITQ 📅 Version: 1.5 📊 Design Decisions

✨ Features

🔍 Search & Filter
Full-text search across all fields. Filter by Component, Type, Category, Status and Criticality.
⊞ Group by Category
Toggle grouping by category with collapsible sections for better navigation.
↔ Resizable Columns
Drag column borders to resize. All content is readable at any width.
✏️ Edit Design Decisions
Edit any field including Type, Status, Criticality, Notes and Justification.
⭐ Mark for Export
Star individual rows or bulk-mark selections. Stats by component shown in sidebar.
📤 Excel Export
Export marked, selected, or all filtered decisions in the original Excel format.
📥 Import Excel
Drag & drop or browse to import a new Design Library .xlsx file.
＋ Temporary DD
Add custom Design Decisions for the session (marked TEMP, not persisted).
📝 Bulk Notes
Apply notes to multiple selected Design Decisions in one action.
🌙 Dark Theme
Toggle dark/light mode for comfortable use in any environment.
🔖 Source Tracking
Each DD is tagged with its origin: Excel (library only), Web Doc (official docs only), or Both. Filterable.
🖱️ Click-to-Edit ID
Click directly on an ID in the table to instantly open its edit modal — no selection step needed.
⭐ Marked Filter
Filter the table to show only marked or unmarked Design Decisions via the sidebar.
🔀 Multi-version Support
Switch between VCF 9.0 and VCF 9.1 via the header dropdown. Import a new Excel to populate VCF 9.1 data.
🔒 Private Library
Authenticated access to Low-Level Design Decisions across 5 VCF Fleet blueprints. Login required — request access via the built-in form.
📋 Blueprint Selector
Switch between all 5 VCF Fleet blueprints in the private section. Each blueprint shows its High Level Deployment Requirements.
⚙️ Admin Panel
Admins can manage user accounts: create, activate/deactivate, reset password, and delete users. All credentials stored as SHA-256 hashes.
📧 Access Request
Non-authenticated users can request access via an integrated form. The admin receives an email via EmailJS automatically.

📋 Changelog

v1.5 — Supabase Auth
  • Authentication migrated to Supabase Auth (bcrypt server-side, JWT sessions).
  • Sessions persistantes cross-browser et en navigation privée.
  • User management via Edge Function — clé service role jamais exposée côté client.
  • Base de données PostgreSQL avec Row Level Security.
v1.4 — Private Library & Admin Panel
  • Added Private Library section with authentication (SHA-256 hashed passwords, sessionStorage).
  • Embedded 1,547 Low-Level Design Decisions across 5 VCF Fleet blueprints.
  • Blueprint selector with High Level Deployment Requirements panel (from Broadcom TechDocs).
  • Admin Panel: centralized user management — add, deactivate, reset password, delete.
  • Access Request form: non-authenticated users can request access via EmailJS (automatic email to admin).
v1.3 — Multi-version Support
  • Added version selector in the header to switch between VCF 9.0 and VCF 9.1.
  • VCF 9.0 data is embedded. VCF 9.1 slot is ready — import an Excel file to populate it.
  • Switching version resets all filters, selections and marks automatically.
  • Imported Excel files are stored in the active version's slot for the session.
v1.2 — Click-to-Edit & Marked Filter
  • Clicking directly on a Design Decision ID in the table now opens its edit modal instantly.
  • Added Marked Status filter in the sidebar to show only ⭐ marked or unmarked decisions.
v1.1 — Source Tracking & Deduplication
  • Added Source field to every Design Decision: Excel (library only), Web Doc (official Broadcom TechDocs only), or Both.
  • Integrated 42 missing DDs sourced exclusively from the official VCF 9.0 documentation (new components: NECE; new topics: VPCFSVC, SWS, BGP dual-AZ, and others).
  • Deduplicated the dataset — removed redundant rows sharing the same ID and category, reducing from 1,625 to a clean unique set.
  • Added Source filter in the sidebar and Source column in the table (sortable, with color-coded badges).
  • Source field included in Excel exports.
v1.0 — Initial Release
Full Design Decision explorer with search, filters, pagination, column resize, edit modal, Excel import/export, category grouping, mark for export, bulk notes, temporary DD, dark theme and responsive layout.
Note: Edits, marks and temporary DDs are session-only and will be lost on page reload. Use Export Marked to save your selections before closing.

Import Design Library

Upload a VCF Design Library Excel file (.xlsx) to replace the current data. The file must have the same structure as the original.

Drop file here or click to browse
